"1. The Anniversary Celebration is about to begin! This is your only chance to get the new event-limited Mech!
 2. Final Raid optimization; Rescue Mission chapter expansion
 3. Mech Awakening System unlocks Supreme +3 to 4 additional Mechs."

title: Heartopia
notes:
◆ Feature Updates and Optimizations ◆
[Hide & Seek Party]
A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

title: Hay Day
notes:
Hay Day is celebrating its 14th anniversary! Join the party with music, rewards, music festival decorations, and a series of very special events.

Birthday celebrations
- Create music, collect musical notes, and unlock music festival decorations.
- Take part in special birthday events across the farm.
- You can also turn the birthday music on or off in Settings.

Boat Orders rework
- We are testing a new version of the Boat Orders experience with a limited group of players so we can tune it befo

title: Monster Hunter Now
notes:
Thank you for playing Monster Hunter Now.

Key Updates:
・Loading screen key visual updated.
・You can now gather from gathering points within your accessible range even when using Wide View.
・Revisions made to features related to Friend Links.
　・When using the Friend Link feature at Elder Dragon Interceptions, you can now choose to send invites to only friends (and not friends of friends).

title: Top Eleven Be Football Manager
notes: Managers, a new version of Top Eleven is here, so get your clubs ready! We've fixed a few bugs and tweaked some features to improve your playing experience. Download this new version and enjoy Top Eleven!
